heading: Stephanie Tubbs Jones Gift of Life Medal
label: H–1 Stephanie Tubbs Jones Gift of Life Medal
notes: CodificationPart was enacted as part of the Stephanie Tubbs Jones Gift of Life Medal Act of 2008, and not as part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Eligibility requirements for Stephanie Tubbs Jones Gift of Life Medal
Solicitation of donations; prohibition on use of Federal funds
Medals not treated as valuable consideration
